title: Project Metadata, Resources, PyInstaller, and Platform Builds · Runtime Lens: Clean Install Smoke
summary: A one-file artifact is copied across operating systems, Tcl/Tk data is assumed present, assets depend on the working directory, and only the build machine launches it. Predict the model, event, graph, solver, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the clean install smoke increment in platform-native signed-off release artifact matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging…
objectives: Launch from a clean user account or machine, exercise create-solve-save-recover-close, and retain artifact identity and diagnostics.
Produce and test separate artifacts on each supported operating system and architecture with recorded toolchains.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-maze-solver-python cumulative accessible desktop maze portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python grid, graph, search, state, and scheduler models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts,
focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, display scaling,
packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazePolicy:
    rows: int = 12
    columns: int = 16
    seed: int = 314159
    maximum_cells: int = 16_384
    reduced_motion: bool = False


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazeEvidence:
    revision: str
    topology_digest: str
    action_trace_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str
    artifact_digest: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python maze solver portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: maze-clean-install-smoke — Launch from a clean user account or machine, exercise create-solve-save-recover-close, and retain artifact identity and diagnostics.
# Evidence: maze-worked-maze-packaging-platforms-2
# Competency: maze-worked-maze-packaging-platforms-2.
# Case 7417: a keyboard-only puzzle tournament.
# Operating constraint: the prior good state must survive failure.
# Changed case: change the grid dimensions and preserve every invariant.
def worked_maze_packaging_platforms_2(target_platforms: int = 3, native_builds: int = 3, clean_launches: int = 3, missing_tk_assets: int = 0, artifact_digests: int = 3) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked2 = "worked2-2dekrow-7417"
    assert evidence_variant_worked2
    evidence_axes_worked2 = (
        "gridworked2",
        "topology7417",
        "search2dekrow",
        "eventworked27417",
        "access7417worked2",
        "recovery2dekrow7417",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked2)) == 6
    if target_platforms < 1 or native_builds < 0:
        return False, native_builds, "platform-matrix"
    if native_builds != target_platforms or clean_launches != target_platforms:
        return False, clean_launches, "clean-install-gap"
    if missing_tk_assets > 0:
        return False, missing_tk_assets, "tk-resource-gap"
    if artifact_digests != target_platforms:
        return False, artifact_digests, "artifact-identity"
    assert clean_launches == target_platforms
    return True, clean_launches, "platform-native-release"

content.code:
# Evidence: maze-clean-install-smoke-u2hhjh
# Competency: maze-clean-install-smoke.
# Case 2028: a low-vision player session.
# Operating constraint: native Tk behavior must not be inferred from browser execution.
# Changed case: change display scale and retain focus and control access.
def evidence_maze_clean_install_smoke_u2hhjh(target_platforms: int = 3, native_builds: int = 3, clean_launches: int = 3, missing_tk_assets: int = 0, artifact_digests: int = 3) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_u2hhjh = "u2hhjh-hjhh2u-2028"
    assert evidence_variant_u2hhjh
    evidence_axes_u2hhjh = (
        "gridu2hhjh",
        "topology2028",
        "searchhjhh2u",
        "eventu2hhjh2028",
        "access2028u2hhjh",
        "recoveryhjhh2u2028",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_u2hhjh)) == 6
    if target_platforms < 1 or native_builds < 0:
        return False, native_builds, "platform-matrix"
    if native_builds != target_platforms or clean_launches != target_platforms:
        return False, clean_launches, "clean-install-gap"
    if missing_tk_assets > 0:
        return False, missing_tk_assets, "tk-resource-gap"
    if artifact_digests != target_platforms:
        return False, artifact_digests, "artifact-identity"
    assert clean_launches == target_platforms
    return True, clean_launches, "platform-native-release"
